text:
Once upon a chilly autumn evening, orphanhood had always felt colder than fog near the moose lakes.

Ellie lived somewhere between there. Though her owl feather stole shadows, she liked them. Owls just knew places.

One day, she found an old map.

In moonlight. Stars blinked. Perhaps just some stories.

She traced owl feet.

Forest green. Maybe secrets?

She found leaves.

Maybe owl friends!?

She snatched bookmarks.

For miles. Maybe!

No dark trees.

Maybe secrets?

That night, stars.

She saw. Stars.

She dreamed.

Find. Friends.

Stars. Friends.

Maybe.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
